Findings.Title: Generic API Key found in src/config.js
Findings.Detail: Rule 'generic-api-key' matched in file src/config.js at line 15. Commit: abc1234.
Findings.Remediation: Rotate the exposed credential and remove it from git history using git-filter-repo or BFG Repo-Cleaner.
